title: Beach spatial extension phase
summary: The beach lee-pocket is the only traversal interest in beach but feels isolated from the rest of the biome. This wave extends beach spatial variety with one driftwood-sheltered tidepool approach and one dune crest viewpoint, adding movement interest without a full cave or climb system.

execution_order.why_now: Beach feels flat outside the lee-pocket; it needs more spatial variety to reward exploration.
A driftwood approach and dune crest add cozy spatial interest cheaply.

guardrails: No cave or climb engine — use platforms and terrain shape only.
Dune crest should be a gentle rise with 2-3 platforms, not a cliff.
Driftwood approach should feel sheltered and cozy.
All new platforms must be recoverable — no trap geometry.
New spatial areas should host authored entities from the content packs.
